shorthandPropertyAssignmentNoCrash.tlua(5,6): error TLUA2364: The left-hand side of an assignment expression must be a variable or a property access.


==== shorthandPropertyAssignmentNoCrash.tlua (1 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/3789
    
    function ff(f: any)
        local g;
        ({ g = function(x: any, y: any) return x + y end } = f);
         ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2364: The left-hand side of an assignment expression must be a variable or a property access.
    end
